Feedback: Thanks for this submission! Great guitar work. Overall this has sort of a jam-band kind of feel to it which isn't a good fit for my lists which are more straight forward pop. Wishing you the best of luck with this tune!
Interesting sound here. Think it might work for me in different context, but the vocal melody on the verses here just didn’t really “hook” me in. One of those subjective things.

Hey there! I love the mysterious vibes with nice instrumentals! I am adding it to our Entp playlist :) .But for our main the vibe is a bit melancholic.  A share of our playlist on your socials and a comment on our submithub profile will be highly appreciated. Thankyou and have a good day. :)
